## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullet points describing what changed and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality not to work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation / non-code change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for this change
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test --workspace=quartz-ui` passes
- [ ] `npm run build --workspace=quartz-ui` succeeds
- [ ] Changeset added (`npx changeset`)
- [ ] A11y considered: roles, states, touch targets, reduce-motion
- [ ] RTL considered: logical properties, direction-aware layout
